Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The two Marine brothers of a sailor battling leukaemia are killed in the line of duty, and to spare the servicemen's family further grief, the secretary of the US Navy seeks the NCIS team's help in locating a suitable bone marrow donor. Meanwhile, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for Thanksgiving. Military crime drama, starring Emily Wickersham

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky is assaulted by a man who claims to have previously undisclosed information about his half-brother, who died decades ago. While his NCIS colleagues traces the attacker's whereabouts, Dr Mallard recalls the emotional final days he spent with his sibling. Elsewhere, as the holiday season approaches, Bishop and Jake discuss the future of their relationship. Naval crime drama, starring David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects foul play when a seaman who was set to testify before a grand jury dies before he can make his court appearance. Meanwhile, a storm causes a massive power outage, and McGee seeks a room for the night among his colleagues. Naval crime drama, starring Sean Murray

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A deep-sea diver is murdered on the job, and his co-workers all become suspects. With each of their suspects confined within a tank, the NCIS team must complete an unorthodox investigation from the outside. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

However, the supposed victim turns up dead, prompting Columbo to take action to unmask the killer. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Bradford Dillman and Ray Milland

programme.title: Columbo: The Conspirators (1978)
programme.desc: A terrorist posing as an Irish author heads a peace organization while secretly running guns for the IRA in Belfast. When he kills an arms dealer who tried to swindle him, the writer is sure he has covered his tracks - until Columbo shambles on to the scene. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Clive Revill, Jeanette Nolan and Bernard Behrens

programme.title: Columbo: A Deadly State of Mind (1975)
programme.desc: A philandering psychiatrist, who involved his mistress in a series of hypnosis experiments, kills her husband in the heat of the moment when the pair are caught out. He persuades his distraught lover to make up a story involving two burglars, but Lt Columbo realises she is lying and goes in search of the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, George Hamilton and Lesley Warren

programme.title: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder (1978)
programme.desc: After discovering that his best friend and his wife were having an affair, a renowned psychologist uses his unique mind-control powers to commit a bizarre murder - with the help of two pet dogs conditioned to attack when they hear a certain command. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall

programme.title: Columbo: Murder in Malibu (1990)
programme.desc: A wealthy romantic novelist realises her lover is only marrying her for her money and calls off their wedding - only to be subsequently murdered. The fiance is quickly cleared of all suspicion, but Columbo remains sure of his guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Andrew Stevens, Brenda Vaccaro and Laurie Walters

programme.title: Columbo: Dagger of the Mind (1972)
programme.desc: A London theatre producer discovers his actress wife is having an affair with her co-star in their latest production. To avoid exposure, the pair murder him and make it look as if his death was an accident. Meanwhile, Columbo is in the city to pick up some tips from Scotland Yard, and sets about uncovering the truth. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Honor Blackman, Richard Basehart and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A magician disappears during a live-burial trick and is later found dead miles away from the location of his performance. Goren and Eames' investigation takes them deep into the mysterious world of magic as they try to unravel the conjuror's final act to identify the murderer

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation

Catherine investigates, and the trail leads to a band whose music glorifies narcotics-related murders - including one song that seems to describe the case in question. Meanwhile, Warrick and Brass deal with the shooting of a salesman

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series following the work of police officers in Lincolnshire as they tackle crime

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: The Proactive Squad from Thames Valley Police use unmarked cars fitted with on-board video cameras to give an insight into vehicle crime and how it can be prevented, featuring footage of dangerous drivers on the overcrowded roads

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: Dramatic reconstruction of the story of Major Phil Ashby of the Royal Marines, who was attacked by child soldiers during a UN peacekeeping mission to disarm warring factions in Sierra Leone, West Africa. Surrounded, outgunned and outnumbered, he risked everything in a desperate bid to escape through 50 miles of rebel-controlled jungle in 2000

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Documentary following Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. The pressure is on as teams race to the scene of a traffic accident in rural Oxfordshire where a family car has left the country road and plummeted 30ft into a ravine. Concern also grows for a jockey who has fallen off her horse and suffered an open leg fracture that requires a dose of painkillers three times the amount that would normally be administered to an injured British solider. Finally, the search is on for a lost paraglider - yielding surprising results

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: The heat is on during the warmest day of the year as the team helps a motorcyclist who finds himself underneath a minibus filled with partygoers in fancy dress. Attention then turns to a 16-year-old youth who has suffered a major head injury after falling from his bike, and in Darlington, Co Durham, a man needs to be extracted from his car following a collision. There is also some confusion over an accident said to have involved a wooden post

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of New Zealand police officers as they try to keep motorists safe on some of the country's most dangerous roads

programme.title: UK Border Force
programme.desc: Documentary series taking viewers inside the UK Border Agency, revealing the work that takes place behind the scenes of the immigration process. Teams at Heathrow Terminal 3, Calais, Dover and across the North West and North East of England reveal the methods and technology used to allow legitimate visitors safe passage while catching those who try to gain illegal entry to the UK

programme.title: UK Border Force
programme.desc: Officers in Calais search lorries for illegal immigrants, while at Heathrow's Terminal Three a student is prevented from entering the UK after a trip to India

programme.title: UK Border Force
programme.desc: Officers at Heathrow's Terminal 3 question a passenger from Johannesburg arriving in London on a tourist visa, suspecting he may be planning to work in the country. Entry Clearance Officer Dan Brown, on secondment to the British High Commission in Delhi, encounters a man carrying false identity documents

programme.title: Premier League's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: From 11-goal thrillers to embarrassing misses, Jamie Carragher reveals his greatest Premier League moments. Interviews with Jose Mourinho, Harry Redknapp and Jermain Defoe

programme.title: Brit Cops

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad

programme.title: The Force: North East

programme.title: Brit Cops

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of struggling musician David Evans, who was imprisoned in the notorious Los Teques jail in Venezuela for trying to smuggle cocaine out of the country. He explains how he came to be involved in the scheme, the events of his arrest and the importance of his guitar during his incarceration. The programme also follows him as he is reunited with his girlfriend at the end of his sentence

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: Dramatic reconstruction of the story of Greg Williams, an American missionary who was kidnapped and held for ransom by a terrorist gang in the Philippines in 1996. He was shackled to a tree and tortured for information - but as his hopes of escape diminished, he discovered one of his captors could present him with an opportunity to flee

programme.desc: Officers launch a city-wide search for a missing local man, deal with youngsters who stole a charity box from a cafe, and evacuate an entire street when a mortar shell is discovered at an auction, requiring the bomb squad to be summoned

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: A police community support officer in Hull discovers a cannabis factory on an industrial estate. An officer tracks down the gang responsible for attacking the owner of a local takeaway and members of the team try to combat the growing homelessness problem by spending a night on the street themselves. Presented by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: Officers visit the home of a couple who are believed to own a banned dog and run tests on the animal to determine its breed. They also deal with a youngster who has breached the conditions of his Asbo, and help a mother who is struggling to cope with her wayward son's bad behaviour. Presented by Rav Wilding

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: A man cultivating cannabis is given a rude awakening by the police, while a disgruntled shop owner feels the pressure of the credit crunch. Meanwhile, the anti-social behaviour patrol catch a boy behaving recklessly by climbing on a community centre roof

programme.title: Neighbourhood Blues
programme.desc: Officers search for a man flouting the rules of a no drinking zone in Hull, and try to track down a notorious car thief. Plus, following complaints from neighbours, a cannabis producer receives a visit, and police try to mend relations between two families who have fallen out

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad

programme.desc: Aa 12-year-old half-Italian Welsh schoolgirl stumbles across a wounded German airman during the Second World War and secretly cares for him - only for tragedy to strike as the local townsfolk discover what she has been up to. Drama, starring Pascale Delafourge Jones, Klaus Behrendt, Margaret John and Sue Jones Davies

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread (1991)
programme.desc: A wealthy widow travels to Italy to escape the pressure of her in-laws, and promptly falls in love with a poor local. When the revived woman agrees to marry her foreign friend, her relatives back home are shocked by the apparent disregard for class, culture and their family's image, and set about putting an end to the unlikely union. Period drama, based on the novel by EM Forster, starring Helena Bonham Carter, Judy Davis and Rupert Graves

programme.title: The Boy Who Stole a Million (1960)
programme.desc: A boy robs a bank to pay for repairs on his father's car, and is pursued by the police and criminals after the money. Comedy adventure, starring Virgilio Teixeira and Maurice Reyna

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Brockley, Peckham and Rotherhithe. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps a music executive and an interior designer find their dream home in Barbados. The couple are used to fighting to get what they want and know a thing or two about houses - so finding a satisfactory property is going to be especially hard

programme.title: Britain's Favourite Supermarket Foods
programme.desc: Cherry Healey presents the first of two programmes in which she explores the unexpected positive health benefits of everyday foods, from the fat-burning properties of dairy to the brain-boosting berry that could get every student concentrating. She begins by tackling the battle of the bulge, with experts and members of the public helping test the common staples that might help everyone to lose weight

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: Stories of courage, suffering and survival from servicemen and women between 1942 and 1945, as revealed by a generation of people now in their nineties and hundreds. This instalment includes the story of Fergus Anckorn who was once the youngest member of the Magic Circle and - at 96 - is now the oldest. He was taken prisoner by the Japanese in Singapore and put to work on the Burma Railway. He managed to survive using his magic to entertain his captors, who rewarded him with food that kept him and his fellow prisoners alive

programme.title: Oxford Street Revealed
programme.desc: A specialist team prepares for the Christmas lights switch-on, one of the most important nights on the London thoroughfare's calendar. Singer Cheryl Fernandez-Versini has been booked to push the button, and it is essential that everything is in place ready for the big moment. Meanwhile, the Metropolitan Police pickpocket team has an eventful weekend, and a light 400 feet above the ground needs replacing on a landmark building. Plus, a chat with the personal shopper giving the British public advice on how to dress well

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: On Friday, May 19, 1536, Henry VIII's second wife Anne Boleyn became the first British queen to be executed, but the circumstances of her death remain shrouded in mystery and contradiction. Hilary Mantel, Philippa Gregory and David Starkey are among the leading authors and historians sifting through the evidence to determine why Henry had her killed

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Quiz show in which three teams of two compete to answer questions and move across a series of screens, while avoiding the dreaded Hot Spots.

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
